title: Oil Spray Bottle for Cooking, 500ML 2 in 1 Olive Oil Dispenser Sprayer for Kitchen Premium Clear Glass Bottle for Cooking, Air Fryer, BBQ, Salad, Black
features: Material: The oil dispenser body is made of thick and transparent lead-free glass, which is not easily broken; The bottle cap is made of high-quality PP material and BPA free
2-in-1 Design: Our oil sprayer combines spraying and pouring functions, perfect for seasoning, BBQ, and baking, helping control fat intake.
User-friendly: 500ml capacity, wide mouth for easy oil adding. Comfortable grip, can be hand or dishwasher cleaned, reusable.
Oil Control: Enlarged nozzle for larger, finer and even spray. Double seal prevents leakage, controls oil well and cuts calories.
Versatile: Adds various condiments like olive oil, vinegar. Also sprays alcohol or water for kitchen and furniture cleaning.
description: ZHIYE Oil Spray Bottle for Cooking, 500ML 2 in 1 Olive Oil Dispenser Sprayer for Kitchen Premium Clear Glass Oil Bottle for Cooking, Air Fryer, BBQ, Salad, Black
